page: Microsoft Azure ND96isr_H200_v5 is an isolated, RDMA-capable virtual machine instance belonging to the NDISRH200V5 server family. This instance is designed for highly intensive computational workloads, featuring 96 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 architecture with Intel processors. The underlying virtualization is managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring dedicated resource allocation and hardware-level isolation.

The hardware configuration includes 1850.0 GB of system memory, which translates to approximately 19.27 GB of RAM per core. For acceleration, the server is equipped with 8.0 GPUs. Local storage capacity is substantial, providing 31769 GB of Premium Storage-capable space. The instance also supports Remote Direct Memory Access (RDMA) networking, which enables low-latency, high-throughput communication across nodes in clustered environments.

In terms of tradeoffs, the instance does not include any complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring external network configuration for public access. Given the massive scale of 8 GPUs, 96 dedicated vCPUs, and over 31 TB of local storage, this server represents a high-density hardware class with a corresponding resource commitment. It is structured for large-scale workloads such as deep learning training, large language model inference, massive database hosting, and high-performance computing simulations.
description: Microsoft Azure ND96isr_H200_v5 is an isolated, RDMA-capable virtual machine instance within the NDISRH200V5 family, designed for intensive computational tasks. It features 96 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by Intel processors and managed via Microsoft Hyper-V. The system is equipped with 1850.0 GB of RAM, offering 19.27 GB per core, alongside 8.0 GPUs for hardware acceleration. Storage capabilities include 31769 GB of Premium Storage-capable local space. This instance supports RDMA networking for low-latency cluster communication but does not provide complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Given its massive resource density, including high-capacity local storage and multiple GPUs, this server represents a premium hardware class. It is engineered for workloads such as distributed deep learning, large-scale AI model training, high-performance computing, and massive database deployments.
